title: sillyworks LITE!!!! :3c
description: a stripped-down version of sillyworks that only features the Block of Silly
body:
sillyworks Lite is a stripped down version of sillyworks, an addon for Create which can be found [here](https://modrinth.com/mod/sillyworks). sillyworks Lite removes all content from sillyworks except for the Block of Silly, the most important object in all of modded Minecraft. It makes funny noises and goes :3
<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/pQH7oOXWyk0" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

not compatible with the full version of sillyworks, for obvious reasons
